repo.description: The code and data of DiverseDepth

terms.context_snippet: This project aims to improve the generalization ability of the monocular depth estimation method on diverse scenes. We propose a learning method and a diverse dataset, termed DiverseDepth, to solve this problem. The [DiverseDepth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2002.00569) contents have …
